html_path.description: Absolute path to rendered HTML file. Must be valid HTML output from render_page. File is read from disk and rendered in headless Chromium.

output_dir.description: Optional: Directory to write screenshot PNG. Defaults to pages/snapshots/. Directory is created if it doesn't exist.

width.description: Browser viewport width in pixels for rendering. Default 1440 (desktop). Use 375 for mobile preview.

height.description: Browser viewport height in pixels. Default 900. Full page is always captured vertically.

image_path.description: Absolute path to the full-page screenshot PNG file. Ready for QA, visual regression testing, or documentation.
